title: Assistant Store Manager - IKEA India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - IKEA India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
